case_title: VIRGINIA B. HAYES VS. SALVADOR F. SAHAGUN, et al

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (4 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HAYES, VIRGINIA B.

ORDER PLTFF'S CONTC REQUEST "GRANTED".
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $59.00) SERVED NOV-04-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAHAGUN, SALVADOR F. SALVADOR SAHAGUN TRUST

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAYES, VIRGINIA B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALVADOR SAHAGUN TRUST $185.72 PRINCIPAL, $141.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $326.72, DEFENDANT SALVADOR SAHAGAN, AN INDIVIDUAL, DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - PARTY IS DECEASED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPT. RETURNED "UNSUCCESSFUL/DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND". (SERVICE FEE $28.00<WAIVED>) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAYES, VIRGINIA B. AS TO DEFENDANT SALVADOR SAHAGUN TRUST
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $256.58 FILED BY HAYES, VIRGINIA B. AS TO DEFENDANT SAHAGUN, SALVADOR F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $348.95 FILED BY HAYES, VIRGINIA B. AS TO DEFENDANT SAHAGUN, SALVADOR F.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-28-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-02-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO SALVADOR F. SAHAGUN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-02-2010 AT 3:30PM.

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (PLAINTIFF PREVIOUSLY MAILED A COPY OF THIS SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT TO THE COURT, PLEASE DISREGARD WHEN IT IS RECEIVED) AS TO DEFENDANT SALVADOR SAHAGUN TRUST

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-24-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-24-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT'S SON DAVID SAHAGUN APPEARS ON HIS BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2010 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-29-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PRIOR TO THE CONTINUED HEARING, PLAINTIFF SHALL (1) FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM THAT ADDS THE SALVADORE SAHAGUN TRUST AS A DEFENDANT; (2) SERVE THE AMENDED CLAIM ON THE SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE, DAVID SAHAGUN; AND (3) FILE PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE AMENDED CLAIM. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAYES, VIRGINIA B.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-02-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
